item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p02","score":1,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant did wake up the anti-spiral/triage pattern, explicitly said to brake, recognized repeated downstream patches, and moved toward a consolidated checklist or auto-validation mechanism. This is more than a direct local repair, but short of full pass criteria."}
